category_sources: source_facts.description says Text processing system for reStructuredText; official site https://docutils.sourceforge.io/ describes Docutils as an open-source text processing system for plaintext documentation.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and documentation consistently use the display name Docutils; source_facts.name is docutils.
docs_sources: Official Docutils documentation overview is at https://docutils.sourceforge.io/docs/index.html; official FAQ is at https://docutils.sourceforge.io/FAQ.html.
repo_sources: Official repository documentation at https://docutils.sourceforge.io/docs/dev/repository.html points to the SourceForge Docutils code repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables list rst2* command-line tools; source_facts.description and official docs identify reStructuredText and text processing functionality.
